headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Amgen, Raises Price Target to $340
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Terence Flynn   maintains Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $332 to $340.
